channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Iran says US must issue multiple-entry visas for its World Cup squad
item.description: Iran's delegation will be based in Tijuana, Mexico, and will travel to the US for all three group stage matches.

item.title: For Gaza, Eid joy is now a form of resistance
item.description: Six were killed in Remal on Eid night. Minutes later, the stalls reopened.

item.title: Al Jazeera journalist’s emotional speech after winning Emmy
item.description: Al Jazeera journalist’s emotional speech after winning Emmy

item.title: Israel intensifies attacks on southern Lebanon, killing at least 16 people
item.description: Southern Lebanon empties out under bombardment as Red Cross warns of worsening crisis.

item.title: The West Bank’s Youth Unemployment Crisis
item.description: The West Bank's Youth Unemployment Crisis

item.title: Israel kills children in strikes on Gaza as fear taints Eid joy
item.description: As Muslims around the world celebrate Eid, Palestinians in Gaza are facing fear, grief, and deadly attacks.

item.title: Ireland football coach urges players to ‘win this war’ against Israel
item.description: Ireland are set to play Israel in home and away Nations League matches, but there has been pressure to boycott games.

item.title: Argentina’s ‘El Loco’ faces Uruguay mutiny ahead of World Cup
item.description: Marcelo Bielsa's demanding coaching style faces internal threat in Uruguay camp ahead of World Cup as results slide.

item.title: Iran says it has a new air defence system. How significant is it?
item.description: Iran’s claimed drone interception has renewed attention on Tehran’s military capabilities after months of bombardment.

item.title: At least 16 students killed in fire at Kenya girls school dorm
item.description: Education minister says 16 killed, 79 injured at Utumishi Girls School in Gilgil, central Kenya.

item.title: Germany’s Voeller urges players to avoid political statements at World Cup
item.description: German players urged not to repeat protests in 2026 following mouth covering in pre-match photos at Qatar World Cup.

item.title: Children with Down syndrome struggle with devastation of war in Gaza
item.description: Children with Down syndrome struggle with devastation of war in Gaza

item.title: China’s secret weapon in AI race with US? Lots of cheap energy
item.description: China's abundant supply of cheap electricity is a key advantage in the rollout of data centres needed to run AI models.

item.title: Israeli attack on Gaza City kills at least 10, including four children
item.description: More than 20 others were injured in the attack, which came hours after the funeral of the head of Hamas’s armed wing.

item.title: Neymar injury threatens Brazil forward’s World Cup as scans needed on calf
item.description: Brazil's record scorer, Neymar, has not played since 2023, but injury now appears to threaten his World Cup comeback.

item.title: Bafana Bafana World Cup squad: South Africa names two uncapped players
item.description: South Africa's 26-man World Cup 2026 squad includes 19 local players, five who play in Europe, and two in the US.

item.title: World Cup delegation compliant with US Ebola protocols, DR Congo says
item.description: 'The Leopards are ready, they are safe, and the ​US will embrace ⁠this team,' DRC's ambassador to the US says.

item.title: Australia charges alleged ISIL-linked woman after return from Syria
item.description: Case follows repatriation of women and children held for years in Syrian camps without trial.

item.title: Iran and US trade attacks after Trump rejects report of Hormuz agreement
item.description: IRGC says it targeted a base used by US forces after US attacks on site near Bandar Abbas.

item.title: What’s happening on Iran war day 90 as US launches new strikes
item.description: The US strikes near Bandar Abbas as tensions rise in the Strait of Hormuz; Iran reports no casualties or damage.

item.title: Morocco tops Africa’s industrialisation index for first time
item.description: North Africa leads Africa’s industrialisation, but continent-wide gains remain slow and uneven.

item.title: Palestinian graduates in the West Bank enter a collapsed job market
item.description: Youth joblessness among West Bank graduates has nearly hit 40 percent. Many wonder what the degrees are worth.

item.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi hailed as a once-in-a-lifetime talent after IPL blitz
item.description: Cricket greats, writers and broadcasters hail 15-year-old Rajasthan Royals opener after his 29-ball 97 in IPL playoffs.

item.title: Ebola outbreak: What travel restrictions have countries imposed?
item.description: Some countries ban arrivals from affected countries while others step up screening in bid to contain rare strain.

item.title: Ghana welcomes home citizens evacuated from South Africa
item.description: The first flight carrying around 300 Ghanaians evacuated from South Africa following anti-immigrant tensions.
